title: AlphaSell
description: AlphaSell is a free Minecraft selling plugin with a clean GUI and a smooth selling system.
body:
Discord: https://discord.gg/BUKdDGwe

AlphaSell is a free Minecraft selling plugin with a clean GUI and a smooth selling system.

You can sell items through the Sell GUI, sell your inventory, sell the item in your hand, check item prices with the Worth system, and view your Sell History.

This plugin also includes category progression, sell multipliers, temporary Sell Events, and Vault economy support.


Commands
/sell
/sellgui
/sellall [material]
/sellhand [confirm]
/alphasell give sellaxe
/sellhistory
/worth
/worth hand
/worth toggle
/sellevent
/alphasell reload

Dependencies
Vault![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57c1ca3b44afbaa6744c6a632740605f9c3a75b3_0.webp)
